reviews.comment:
Tranquilo como agua de charco

(Translated by Google)
Calm as puddle water
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3LWRmZ2hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente el lugar en si, muy completo, pero es un monopolio, no tiene competencia cercana. Al ser el único no hay mucho personal para la cantidad de gente que  pasa por ahí en épocas de vacaciones o fines de semana largo. El predio es grandisimo, la estructura esta apta para recibir muchos contingentes pero en ocaciones por la falta de personal tardan en hacer pedidos mas de  cuarenta minutos.

(Translated by Google)
The place itself is excellent, very complete, but it's a monopoly, with no close competition. Being the only one, there aren't enough staff for the number of people who pass through during vacation periods or long weekends. The premises are huge, and the structure is suitable for large groups, but sometimes, due to staff shortages, it takes more than 40 minutes to process orders.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBal9mYTFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Paraje tranquilo ideal para descanzar un rato antes de seguir viaje. Tiene mucho parque con mesas para comer al aire libre. La atención del personal 10 puntos!

(Translated by Google)
A peaceful spot, ideal for a short rest before continuing your journey. It has a large park with picnic tables. The staff were incredibly helpful!
